query:
SELECT ha.*, h.name, h.scope FROM habit_assignments ha JOIN habits h ON ha.habitId = h.id WHERE ha.clientId = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_habits FROM habits;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT ha.*, h.name, h.scope FROM habit_assignments ha JOIN habits h ON ha.habitId = h.id WHERE ha.clientId = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_habits FROM habits;
